parameters.description: Target directory on sprite filesystem. Defaults to /home/sprite/uploads. Allowed: /home/sprite/uploads, /tmp/uploads

post.description: Send a message to the agent and receive a Server-Sent Events stream. The chat runs in the background — reconnect via GET :name/chat/stream. Event format follows the OpenAI Responses API streaming events (response.*).
post.summary: Chat with an agent (SSE streaming response)

get.description: Subscribe to the ongoing chat event stream. If the agent has an active chat, buffered events are replayed first, then live events are streamed. Use query parameter `since` to skip events with sequence_number <= since.

404.description: No active chat for this agent

get.summary: Reconnect to an active agent chat stream (SSE)

post.description: Routes to the correct upstream provider based on model name. Anthropic models are automatically converted between OpenAI and Anthropic formats. OpenAI, Google, and OpenRouter models are passed through as-is.

200.description: Chat completion response (JSON or SSE stream)

get.description: Returns models from the pricing database in OpenAI-compatible format.

Proxies requests to upstream providers (anthropic, openai, openrouter). Agents use this endpoint instead of calling provider APIs directly. Authentication is via proxy token (bxp_...), not Supabase JWT. LLM requests are subject to credit enforcement and usage tracking.

planExpiresAt.description: Plan expiration date (ISO string), null if free tier

currentPeriodStart.description: Current billing period start time (ISO string)

currentPeriodEnd.description: Current billing period end time (ISO string)

type.description: Checkout type. Only plan upgrade is supported.

upgradeToPlan.description: Target plan for upgrade. Required when type=upgrade. Determines the checkout amount (standard=$29, pro=$99) and upgrades the user tier on successful payment.

months.description: Number of months for the upgrade. 12 = annual billing with discount (pay for 10 months). Defaults to 1. Only applicable when type=upgrade.

successUrl.description: Redirect URL after successful payment. Passed by the frontend to support different deployment environments. Falls back to the backend BASE_URL if not provided.

cancelUrl.description: Redirect URL after payment cancellation. Passed by the frontend to support different deployment environments. Falls back to the backend BASE_URL if not provided.

returnUrl.description: Return URL after closing the portal. Passed by the frontend to support different deployment environments. Falls back to the backend BASE_URL if not provided.

token.description: Invite token for accepting the invite

key_hint.description: Key hint (shows only the last 4 characters)

provider.description: Provider name, e.g. anthropic, openai, openrouter, resend, twitter, exa

label.description: Optional label to distinguish multiple keys for the same provider

key.description: New API key (leave empty to keep unchanged)

organization_id.description: Organization ID this agent belongs to

template_id.description: Template ID this agent was created from

avatar_seed.description: Avatar seed for DiceBear avatar generation

avatar_style.description: DiceBear avatar style (e.g. adventurer, bottts, pixel-art)

is_test.description: Whether this is a temporary test agent

shared.description: Whether this agent is shared with the organization

creator_display_name.description: Display name of agent creator (for shared agents from other users)

is_online.description: Whether a local agent is currently connected via WebSocket

remote_cwd.description: Working directory on the remote machine

name.description: Agent name, 3-30 alphanumeric characters and hyphens, must start with a letter (stored lowercase)

personality_preset_id.description: Personality preset ID (e.g. concise, detailed, friendly)

template_id.description: Template ID to create agent from. Template config is used as defaults; explicit fields override.

avatar_seed.description: Avatar seed for DiceBear avatar generation

avatar_style.description: DiceBear avatar style (e.g. adventurer, bottts, pixel-art)

is_test.description: Whether this is a temporary test agent (used by Workshop)

name.description: Agent name, 3-30 alphanumeric characters and hyphens, must start with a letter (stored lowercase)

personality_preset_id.description: Personality preset ID (e.g. concise, detailed, friendly)

avatar_seed.description: Avatar seed for DiceBear avatar generation

avatar_style.description: DiceBear avatar style (e.g. adventurer, bottts, pixel-art)

shared.description: Share this agent with the organization

filePaths.description: Paths of uploaded files on the sprite filesystem

message.description: Message content to send to the agent

filePaths.description: Paths of previously uploaded files to include as context

fileMetadata.description: Metadata for attached files (filename, mediaType). Persisted with the user message for display in chat history.
